examples: Other economies followed suit, if slightly less ambitiously.
More ambitiously, he wants to rethink the school's hallowed teaching methods.
Originally, I ambitiously thought I'd make it a site to collect all of these tips together.
They had enough time, if they had gone ambitiously enough, to turn it around but they just didn't.
Early on Merck ambitiously pursued an antiviral cocktail containing four vaccines: two against cancer, two against genital warts.
